description: ADM2 biodiversity evidence for focus-region boundaries using GBIF coordinated occurrences. Counts are queried by ADM2 bounding box and are not yet sampling-bias corrected.

zones.geometryNote: GBIF was queried with the ADM2 boundary bounding box. Counts are real GBIF records but not polygon-clipped or corrected for observer effort.
